  • Uses of NamedClientMcpTransport in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure

    Methods in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure that return types with arguments of type NamedClientMcpTransport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<NamedClientMcpTransport>
    StdioTransportAutoConfiguration.stdioTransports(McpStdioClientProperties stdioProperties)
    Creates a list of stdio-based transports for MCP communication.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure with type arguments of type NamedClientMcpTransport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<io.modelcontextprotocol.client.McpAsyncClient>
    McpClientAutoConfiguration.mcpAsyncClients(McpAsyncClientConfigurer mcpAsyncClientConfigurer, McpClientCommonProperties commonProperties, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<List<NamedClientMcpTransport>> transportsProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<ClientMcpAsyncHandlersRegistry> clientMcpAsyncHandlersRegistry)
     
    List<io.modelcontextprotocol.client.McpSyncClient>
    McpClientAutoConfiguration.mcpSyncClients(McpSyncClientConfigurer mcpSyncClientConfigurer, McpClientCommonProperties commonProperties, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<List<NamedClientMcpTransport>> transportsProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<ClientMcpSyncHandlersRegistry> clientMcpSyncHandlersRegistry)
    Creates a list of McpSyncClient instances based on the available transports.

  • Uses of NamedClientMcpTransport in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.httpclient.autoconfigure

    Methods in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.httpclient.autoconfigure that return types with arguments of type NamedClientMcpTransport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<NamedClientMcpTransport>
    SseHttpClientTransportAutoConfiguration.sseHttpClientTransports(McpSseClientConnectionDetails connectionDetails, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<tools.jackson.databind.json.JsonMapper> jsonMapperProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<McpClientCustomizer<io.modelcontextprotocol.client.transport.HttpClientSseClientTransport.Builder>> transportCustomizers)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Creates a list of HTTP client-based SSE transports for MCP communication.
    List<NamedClientMcpTransport>
    StreamableHttpHttpClientTransportAutoConfiguration.streamableHttpHttpClientTransports(McpStreamableHttpClientProperties streamableProperties, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<tools.jackson.databind.json.JsonMapper> jsonMapperProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<McpClientCustomizer<io.modelcontextprotocol.client.transport.HttpClientStreamableHttpTransport.Builder>> transportCustomizers)
    Creates a list of HTTP client-based Streamable HTTP transports for MCP communication.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<NamedClientMcpTransport>
    SseWebFluxTransportAutoConfiguration.sseWebFluxClientTransports(McpSseClientConnectionDetails connectionDetails, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient.Builder> webClientBuilderProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<tools.jackson.databind.json.JsonMapper> jsonMapperProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<McpClientCustomizer<WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder>> transportCustomizers)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Creates a list of WebFlux-based SSE transports for MCP communication.
    List<NamedClientMcpTransport>
    StreamableHttpWebFluxTransportAutoConfiguration.streamableHttpWebFluxClientTransports(McpStreamableHttpClientProperties streamableProperties, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient.Builder> webClientBuilderProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<tools.jackson.databind.json.JsonMapper> jsonMapperProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<McpClientCustomizer<WebClientStreamableHttpTransport.Builder>> transportCustomizers)
    Creates a list of WebFlux-based Streamable HTTP transports for MCP communication.
